name: Shottr
description: Native Apple Silicon screenshot and annotation app for macOS — scrolling capture, OCR, measuring, pixel-perfect.

seo.title: Shottr — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Shottr: Native Apple Silicon screenshot and annotation app for macOS — scrolling capture, OCR, measuring, pixel-perfect.

when_to_use: Pixel-perfect UI comparison screenshots for QA testing
Scrolling full-page capture for design documentation
OCR text extraction from screenshots on Apple Silicon
Annotated bug report screenshots with measurement tools
Native fast screenshot app without Setapp dependency

pros: Built-in OCR beats CleanShot for copy-paste
Pixel measuring and annotation are precise
cons: macOS only, no Windows or Linux
No cloud sync or team sharing features
UI is functional but not polished
review.verdict: The power-user macOS screenshot tool — faster than CleanShot and cheaper, if you don't need team features.
review.best_for: Mac developers and designers needing fast native screenshots with OCR and scrolling
review.not_for: Teams needing cloud sync, recording, and collaboration features of CleanShot X
